heading: Repealed. , (4), ,Pub. L. 100–42, § 1(a)(3)101 Stat. 310May 21, 1987
label: 8371, 8372 Repealed. , (4), ,Pub. L. 100–42, § 1(a)(3)101 Stat. 310May 21, 1987
notes: Section 8371, , , , authorized Secretary to prohibit by order the use of natural gas as primary energy source in existing boilers used for space heating purposes which consume 300 Mcf or more natural gas per day and have capability to use petroleum as primary energy source, and in new boilers to be used for space heating purposes which would be capable of consuming 300 Mcf or more of natural gas per day.Pub. L. 95–620, title IV, § 40192 Stat. 3314Nov. 9, 1978

Section 8372, , , ; , , , prohibited installation of outdoor lighting fixtures using natural gas before , phased out distribution of natural gas to be used in outdoor lighting other than that installed for residential use before , and required distributors of natural gas to disseminate information to customers to discourage use of natural gas for outdoor lighting.Pub.
